V1.description: Bar charts to compare mean satisfaction_score, churn_score, and CLTV for different customer groups.

V2.description: Box plots to observe the spread and central tendency of satisfaction_score, churn_score, and CLTV for different customer groups.

V3.description: Heat maps to visualize correlations between service usage and customer_status.

V4.description: Stacked bar charts to show proportions of demographic features within each customer status group.

V5.description: Scatter plots to investigate correlations between churn_score and CLTV, color-coded by customer_status.

V6.description: Line charts or area charts to trend satisfaction_score or churn_score over tenure for different customer groups.

V7.description: Custom bubble charts or stacked bar charts to cluster churn reasons and promotional offers.
